case_title: TRAVELERS CASUALTY AND SURETY COMPANY VS. RONALD J HAAN

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAVELERS CASUALTY AND SURETY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HAAN, RONALD J JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAVELERS CASUALTY AND SURETY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAAN, RONALD J $2,086,861.57 PRINCIPAL, $15,436.71 INTEREST, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,102,504.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IN FULL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAVELERS CASUALTY AND SURETY COMPANY
